data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes complexity in decision-making processes by offering user interfaces that simplify choices.
data.technical_spec: Limiting options to improve user satisfaction and reduce choice paralysis.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs influenced by Fitts's Law ensure targets (such as buttons) are easily and efficiently accessible.
data.technical_spec: Optimized UI controls by positioning interactive elements where users can quickly engage with them.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focuses on providing memorable user experiences by emphasizing peak moments of interaction.
data.technical_spec: Specifically crafted interactions or features that are highlighted within user journeys.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes visually appealing designs that foster perceptions of ease-of-use.
data.technical_spec: Stylized and consistent design themes applied across all user interface elements.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leverages familiar design patterns and conventions to meet user expectations and bolster ease of navigation.
data.technical_spec: Alignment with widely accepted user interface standards to streamline user engagement.
